creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
eadler      2012-05-02 15:50:24 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    ports-mgmt/portupgrade-devel Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Sync -devel port with release
  
  Changes:
  Fixes regression introduced 2.4.9.4 release, causing failed upgrades to
  be seen as successes. Reported by: Matthew D. Fuller
  <fullermd@over-yonder.net>
  
  PR:             ports/167512
  Submitted by:   "Bryan Drewery" <bryan@shatow.net> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.283     +2 -2      ports/ports-mgmt/portupgrade-devel/Makefile
  1.192     +2 -2      ports/ports-mgmt/portupgrade-devel/distinfo
  1.41      +1 -1      ports/ports-mgmt/portupgrade-devel/pkg-plist
